/opt/intel/oneapi/compiler/2025.3/bin/icpx -fPIC  -O3 -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -ipo -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/deep_ep_cpp_xpu.dir/link.d  -o deep_ep_cpp_xpu.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/deep_ep_cpp_xpu.dir/deep_ep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deep_ep_cpp_xpu.dir/kernels/runtime.cu.o CMakeFiles/deep_ep_cpp_xpu.dir/kernels/layout.cu.o CMakeFiles/deep_ep_cpp_xpu.dir/kernels/intranode.cu.o CMakeFiles/deep_ep_cpp_xpu.dir/kernels/internode.cu.o CMakeFiles/deep_ep_cpp_xpu.dir/kernels/internode_ll.cu.o   -L/opt/intel/oneapi/mkl/2025.3/lib/intel64_win  -L/opt/intel/oneapi/mkl/2025.3/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/intel/oneapi/mkl/2025.3/lib/intel64_win:/opt/intel/oneapi/mkl/2025.3/lib/win-x64:/root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib /root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib/libtorch.so /root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib/libc10.so /root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib/libkineto.a /root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib/libc10_xpu.so /root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib/libtorch_xpu.so /root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib/libtorch_python.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib/libtorch_xpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib/libc10_xpu.so /root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib/libc10.so /opt/intel/oneapi/compiler/2025.3/lib/libsycl.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/root/jiafuzha/code-repo/pytorch/torch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed
